news.t: Cartesian Growth Corporation III Announces Pricing of Upsized $240 Million Initial Public Offering
Pacer ETFs Introduces New Global Growth Strategy with Launch of the Pacer MSCI World Industry Advantage ETF
Alvarium, Tiedemann complete business combination with Cartesian Growth

holdings.infoBox: GLBL is an equity ETF with a total of 367 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 4.90%, Microsoft at 4.66%, Amazon.com at 4.62%, NVIDIA at 4.61%, and Alphabet at 4.59%.

overview.description: The Pacer MSCI World Industry Advantage ETF (GLBL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund aims to track an index that selects a set of securities from leading countries which have the highest active weight in each of the GICS Industry Groups relative to the parent index. Weighting is based on modified market-cap. GLBL was launched on Sep 16, 2024 and is issued by Pacer.
infoTable: MSCI World Ricardo Comparative Advantage Select GDP Tilted Index

data.title: Pacer ETFs Introduces New Global Growth Strategy with Launch of the Pacer MSCI World Industry Advantage ETF
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $GLBL #etfs--Pacer ETFs delivers fresh way to invest in global, developed market leaders that have a competitive advantage in their industry.
